member.name: T:ExecutorService
member.summary: ExecutorService replacement for Hedera SDK. Provides a fixed thread pool with unbounded queue and caller-runs policy.

member.name: M:ExecutorService.Execute(System.Action)
member.summary: Schedules an action for execution (caller-runs if queue is full).

member.name: M:ExecutorService.ForceShutdown
member.summary: Immediately clears remaining queued tasks and signals threads to exit.

member.name: M:ExecutorService.Submit(System.Action)
member.summary: Waits for all tasks to complete or timeout to elapse.
Submits a task and returns a Task for async usage.

member.name: M:ExecutorService.Dispose
member.summary: Gracefully shuts down the executor (stops accepting new tasks).
